name: relentless
description: Operating charter for long, unattended, autonomous build-and-ship tasks. Sets a definition of done, works in an isolated worktree, arms a self-continuing loop, fans work across parallel agents/devices, guards every surface against regressions with a full test pyramid, runs autonomous end-to-end QA (real paid API calls, browser + screenshots, LLM-as-judge), hardens with a review pass, and does not stop until the product is truly shippable.
